name: 04 — Error Monitor (Logs → Claude Diagnose → GitHub Issue)

nodes.name: Error Webhook
nodes.notes: POST from your app: {error, stack, context, severity, app}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 1000, "system": "You are a senior backend engineer diagnosing production errors. Be concise and actionable. Output valid JSON only: {"title": string, "root_cause": string, "fix": string, "prevention": string, "severity": "critical|high|medium"}", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Diagnose this error and return JSON:

Error: " + $json.error + "
Stack: " + ($json.stack || 'not provided') + "
Context: " + JSON.stringify($json.context || {}) + "
App: " + ($json.app || 'unknown')}]} }}

meta.description: Your app POSTs errors here. Claude diagnoses root cause and fix. Creates labeled GitHub issue + Discord alert. Skip low severity errors automatically.
meta.usage: In your app: fetch('http://n8n:5678/webhook/error-ingest', {method:'POST', body: JSON.stringify({error: err.message, stack: err.stack, context: {url, userId}, severity: 'high', app: 'myapp'})})
